boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement issue the purchase order for a controlled solvent?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact EHS execution release present
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-NOV-042-P requires EHS execution release match before PO
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Policy requires matching EHS release before PO issuance

final_answer: The action boundary remains open. EHS-NOV-042 indicates the purchase execution release for NS-55 is unscheduled. STD-NOV-042-P mandates an exact EHS execution release match before PO issuance. SRC-NOV-042 limits activity to quote collection. Therefore, the purchase order cannot be issued. Escalate due to the unscheduled EHS release.
